displayNameZh: 题目管道多，但 Distribution 很有挑战
summary: Yt Easy Channel Hard Dist component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「题目管道多，但 Distribution 很有挑战」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-easy-channel-hard-dist/src/YtEasyChannelHardDist.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtEasyChannelHardDist` and `ytEasyChannelHardDistDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Easy Channel Hard Dist Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-easy-channel-hard-dist to my project. Preserve the exported YtEasyChannelHardDistProps API and register the YtEasyChannelHardDist composition with the default props.
